release_notes: iPos Sync Agent v0.5.10 is an Import Backup safety/speed patch: SYNC SEKARANG and RETRY FAILED PRODUCTS now lock automatically while Import Backup is running, the pg_restore console window no longer flashes on screen, and restores are up to 2.25x faster (pg_restore --jobs=4, verified against a real production backup with identical data). No changes to sync logic, pricing, or Product Manager behavior from v0.5.9.
